20.kj: adversity, affliction, bad, calamity, [phrase] displease(-ure), distress, evil((-favouredness), man, thing), [phrase] exceedingly, [idiom] great, grief(-vous), harm, heavy, hurt(-f

20.gl: the heart; also used (figuratively) very widely for the feelings, the will and even the intellect; likewise for the centre of anything
20.kj: [phrase] care for, comfortably, consent, [idiom] considered, courag(-eous), friend(-ly), ((broken-), (hard-), (merry-), (stiff-), (stout-), double) heart(-ed), [idiom] heed, [idiom
behold (by mistake for H7789 (שׁוּר)), sing(-er, -ing man, -ing woman).
20.dv: or (the original form) שׁוּר; (1 Samuel 18:6), a primitive root (rather identical with H7788 (שׁוּר) through the idea of strolling minstrelsy);

20.gl: a covering, i.e. clothing; also treachery or pillage
20.kj: apparel, cloth(-es, ing), garment, lap, rag, raiment, robe, [idiom] very (treacherously), vesture, wardrobe.

20.gl: to advance, i.e. pass on or continue; causatively, to remove; specifically, to bedeck (i.e. bring an ornament upon)
20.kj: adorn, deck (self), pass by, take away.

21.kj: [idiom] at all, burn up, consume, devour(-er, up), dine, eat(-er, up), feed (with), food, [idiom] freely, [idiom] in...wise(-deed, plenty), (lay) meat, [idiom] quite.

21.gl: to quaff, i.e. (causatively) to irrigate or furnish apotion to
21.kj: cause to (give, give to, let, make to) drink, drown, moisten, water. See H7937 (שָׁכַר), H8354 (שָׁתָה).

21.gl: food (for man or beast), especially bread, or grain (for making it)
21.kj: (shew-) bread, [idiom] eat, food, fruit, loaf, meat, victuals.
21.dv: from H3898 (לָחַם); See also H1036 (בֵּית לְעַפְרָה)

21.gl: water; figuratively, juice; by euphemism, urine, semen
21.dv: dual of a primitive noun (but used in a singular sense);

22.gl: to be safe (in mind, body or estate); figuratively, to be (causatively, make) completed; by implication, to be friendly; by extension, to reciprocate (in various applications)
22.kj: make amends, (make an) end, finish, full, give again, make good, (re-) pay (again), (make) (to) (be at) peace(-able), that is perfect, perform, (make) prosper(-ous), recompense, re

22.gl: the head (as most easily shaken), whether literal or figurative (in many applications, of place, time, rank, itc.)
22.kj: band, beginning, captain, chapiter, chief(-est place, man, things), company, end, [idiom] every (man), excellent, first, forefront, (be-)head, height, (on) high(-est part, (priest)
22.dv: from an unused root apparently meaning to shake;

22.gl: thou and thee, or (plural) ye and you
22.dv: or (shortened); אַתָּ; or אַת; feminine (irregular) sometimes אַתִּי; plural masculine אַתֶּם; feminine אַתֶּן; or אַתֵּנָהlemma אתֵּנָה missing vowel

22.gl: Jehovah, Jewish national name of God
22.kj: Jehovah, the Lord. Compare H3050 (יָהּ), H3069 (יְהֹוִה).

22.dv: or (feminine) גַּחֶלֶת; from an unused root meaning to glow or kindle;

22.gl: to lay hold of; especially to pick up fire

23.gl: the face (as the part that turns); used in a great variety of applications (literally and figuratively); also (with prepositional prefix) as a preposition (before, etc.)
23.kj: [phrase] accept, a-(be-) fore(-time), against, anger, [idiom] as (long as), at, [phrase] battle, [phrase] because (of), [phrase] beseech, countenance, edge, [phrase] employ, endure
23.dv: plural (but always as singular) of an unused noun פָּנֶה; from H6437 (פָּנָה));

23.gl: properly, to twist or whirl (in a circular or spiral manner), i.e. (specifically) to dance, to writhe in pain (especially of parturition) or fear; figuratively, to wait, to pervert
23.kj: bear, (make to) bring forth, (make to) calve, dance, drive away, fall grievously (with pain), fear, form, great, grieve, (be) grievous, hope, look, make, be in pain, be much (sore)

23.gl: wind; by resemblance breath, i.e. a sensible (or even violent) exhalation; figuratively, life, anger, unsubstantiality; by extension, a region of the sky; by resemblance spirit, but only of a rational being (including it
23.kj: air, anger, blast, breath, [idiom] cool, courage, mind, [idiom] quarter, [idiom] side, spirit(-ual), tempest, [idiom] vain, (whirl-) wind(-y).

23.gl: the tongue (of man or animals), used literally (as the instrument of licking, eating, or speech), and figuratively (speech, an ingot, a fork of flame, a cove of water)
23.kj: [phrase] babbler, bay, [phrase] evil speaker, language, talker, tongue, wedge.
23.dv: or לָשֹׁן; also (in plural) feminine לְשֹׁנָה; from H3960 (לָשַׁן);

23.gl: a cover (in a good or a bad, a literal or a figurative sense)
23.kj: backbiting, covering, covert, [idiom] disguise(-th), hiding place, privily, protection, secret(-ly, place).

23.gl: properly, hidden, i.e. dark; used only of the north as aquarter (gloomy and unknown)

24.kj: beautiful, best, better, bountiful, cheerful, at ease, [idiom] fair (word), (be in) favour, fine, glad, good (deed, -lier, -liest, -ly, -ness, -s), graciously, joyful, kindly, kind

24.gl: properly, to sit down (specifically as judge. in ambush, in quiet); by implication, to dwell, to remain; causatively, to settle, to marry
24.kj: (make to) abide(-ing), continue, (cause to, make to) dwell(-ing), ease self, endure, establish, [idiom] fail, habitation, haunt, (make to) inhabit(-ant), make to keep (house), lurk

24.gl: a house (in the greatest variation of applications, especially family, etc.)

(adulter) ess, each, every, female, [idiom] many, [phrase] none, one, [phrase] together, wife, woman. Often unexpressed in English.
24.dv: feminine of H376 (אִישׁ) or H582 (אֱנוֹשׁ); irregular plural, נָשִׁים;(used in the same wide sense as H582 (אֱנוֹשׁ))

24.gl: a roof; by analogy, the top of an altar
24.kj: roof (of the house), (house) top (of the house).

24.gl: an angle; by implication, a pinnacle; figuratively, a chieftain

25.gl: good (as an adjective) in the widest sense; used likewise as a noun, both in the masculine and the feminine, the singular and the plural (good, a good or good thing, a good man or woman; the good, goods or good things, g

25.gl: properly, a breathing creature, i.e. animal of (abstractly) vitality; used very widely in a literal, accommodated or figurative sense (bodily or mental)
25.kj: any, appetite, beast, body, breath, creature, [idiom] dead(-ly), desire, [idiom] (dis-) contented, [idiom] fish, ghost, [phrase] greedy, he, heart(-y), (hath, [idiom] jeopardy of)

25.gl: the earth (at large, or partitively a land)
25.kj: [idiom] common, country, earth, field, ground, land, [idiom] natins, way, [phrase] wilderness, world.
25.dv: from an unused root probably meaning to be firm;

25.gl: water; figuratively, juice; by euphemism, urine, semen
25.dv: dual of a primitive noun (but used in a singular sense);

25.gl: remoteness, i.e. (concretely) a distant place; often (adverbially) from afar
25.kj: (a-, dwell in, very) far (country, off). See also H1023 (בֵּית הַמֶּרְחָק).
bruit, doctrine, fame, mentioned, news, report, rumor, tidings.

26.gl: the face (as the part that turns); used in a great variety of applications (literally and figuratively); also (with prepositional prefix) as a preposition (before, etc.)
26.kj: [phrase] accept, a-(be-) fore(-time), against, anger, [idiom] as (long as), at, [phrase] battle, [phrase] because (of), [phrase] beseech, countenance, edge, [phrase] employ, endure
26.dv: plural (but always as singular) of an unused noun פָּנֶה; from H6437 (פָּנָה));

26.gl: properly, something dug, i.e. a (general) source (of water, even when naturally flowing; also of tears, blood (by euphemism, of the female pudenda); figuratively, of happiness, wisdom, progeny)
a fountain (also collectively), figuratively, a source (of satisfaction)
26.dv: or מַעְיְנוֹ; (Psalm 114:8), or (feminine) מַעְיָנָה; from H5869 (עַיִן) (as a denominative in the sense of a spring);

26.gl: to decay, i.e. (causatively) ruin (literally or figuratively)
26.kj: batter, cast off, corrupt(-er, thing), destroy(-er, -uction), lose, mar, perish, spill, spoiler, [idiom] utterly, waste(-r).

26.gl: to waver; by implication, to slip, shake, fall
26.kj: be carried, cast, be out of course, be fallen in decay, [idiom] exceedingly, fall(-ing down), be (re-) moved, be ready, shake, slide, slip.

26.gl: morally wrong; concretely, an (actively) bad person
26.kj: [phrase] condemned, guilty, ungodly, wicked (man), that did wrong.

27.gl: good (as an adjective) in the widest sense; used likewise as a noun, both in the masculine and the feminine, the singular and the plural (good, a good or good thing, a good man or woman; the good, goods or good things, g

27.gl: properly, weight, but only figuratively in a good sense, splendor or copiousness
honey (from its stickiness); by analogy, syrup
27.dv: from an unused root meaning to be gummy;

28.gl: a man as an individual or a male person; often used as an adjunct to a more definite term (and in such cases frequently not expressed in translation)
28.kj: also, another, any (man), a certain, [phrase] champion, consent, each, every (one), fellow, (foot-, husband-) man, (good-, great, mighty) man, he, high (degree), him (that is), hus
28.dv: contracted for H582 (אֱנוֹשׁ) (or perhaps rather from an unused root meaning to be extant);

28.gl: wind; by resemblance breath, i.e. a sensible (or even violent) exhalation; figuratively, life, anger, unsubstantiality; by extension, a region of the sky; by resemblance spirit, but only of a rational being (including it
28.kj: air, anger, blast, breath, [idiom] cool, courage, mind, [idiom] quarter, [idiom] side, spirit(-ual), tempest, [idiom] vain, (whirl-) wind(-y).

28.gl: a non-entity; generally used as a negative particle
28.kj: else, except, fail, (father-) less, be gone, in(-curable), neither, never, no (where), none, nor, (any, thing), not, nothing, to nought, past, un(-searchable), well-nigh, without.
28.dv: as if from a primitive root meaning to be nothing or not exist;

28.gl: to break out (in many applications, direct and indirect, literal and figurative)
28.kj: [idiom] abroad, (make a) breach, break (away, down, -er, forth, in, up), burst out, come (spread) abroad, compel, disperse, grow, increase, open, press, scatter, urge.

28.gl: a city (a place guarded by waking or a watch) in the widest sense (even of a mere encampment or post)
28.kj: Ai (from margin), city, court (from margin), town.
28.dv: or (in the plural) עָר; or עָיַר; (Judges 10:4), from H5782 (עוּר)
feminine active participle of an unused root apparently meaning to join;
